title: Motion draft
description: Starter canvas for drafting a motion. Lanes mirror the standard motion structure (caption, intro, statement of facts, argument, conclusion).

lanes.title: Caption + intro
lanes.description: Court, parties, case number, motion title, relief requested.

lanes.title: Statement of facts
lanes.description: Material facts with citation to record (declaration, exhibit, deposition).

lanes.title: Argument
lanes.description: Heading per legal point; cite controlling cases first, persuasive after.
